name: Angel Hair Pasta with Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Red bell pepper, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan over medium heat, melt the butter. Stir in the flour and cook for a few minutes until golden.
2. Add milk and heavy cream, bring to a gentle simmer, and continue to stir until thickened.
3. Add pesto sauce, chopped parsley, minced garlic, grated Parmesan cheese, salt, white pepper, Worcestershire sauce, and Tabasco. Stir until blended.
4. Reduce the heat and keep warm, stirring occasionally.
5. Cook the pasta quickly in a large pot of boiling water (3 to 4 minutes, or until al dente).
6. Poach the red bell pepper, snow peas, and shrimp in another pot of boiling water (2 to 3 minutes, or until just heated through).
7. Drain the pasta and mix it with the sauce.
8. Portion into heated individual serving bowls.
9. Garnish each portion with shrimp and vegetables, and serve immediately.
